feed.title: AO3 - Jason Todd/Reader (Filtered)

entry.title: Fall in love again and again
entry.summary:
Author: reveriery

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,222Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: Summary: just moments that made either them or you fall in love again and again.Characters: Bruce Wayne, Jason Todd, Tim Drake, Dick Graysonc/w: Food mentioned in Jason's part. reader is alluded to be a foodie in Jason's part.a/n: Maybe OOC. dick's part is kind of bad. but i kind of wanted to touch on that topic though, so I digress. Constructive criticisms appreciated. Will do for other characters as I read and know more . So some characters may seem OOC. Bruce's headcanon is based on the second episode of Justice League Unlimited, where he had to sing to save Diana.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Loving Machine
entry.summary:
Author: Spenc56623

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,690Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 31

Summary: After a long night of work, getting home and finally relaxing, the one and only Red Hood falls into your apartment. Thinking it is his safe house, he is confused why you're here but when you notice him bleeding, your nurse instincts take over. Ignoring your fear, you patch him up. He leaves with A promise, threat, or warning, maybe even all three, that he will be back at some point in time.

entry.title: Only Yours
entry.summary:
Author: treeteaofversailles

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,847Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 16

Summary: You had to tell him. You needed to tell him. That was what you and he agreed on at the beginning of your relationship. That you’d tell each other everything and work on growing together instead of running from your feelings when it gets hard. You swallowed and looked at him. “Who’s Artemis?” ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ You get jealous of Artemis and your overthinking mind begins to spiral, unraveling your insecurities. You decide to confront Jason and he erases your worries.

entry.title: In the Lowlight
entry.summary:
Author: magpietendencies (writtenintostars)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,638Chapters: 5/38Kudos: 110

Summary: There’s nothing recognizable about Jason, except maybe the way he zeroes in on you the second you step into the room. He always treated you that way, like you were what he was waiting for, the only reason he even showed up. “Jason.” You say when you remember how to talk again. You’re vaguely aware that you’re digging your nails into your palms. You tell yourself to blink, your eyes beginning to water, but you can’t bring yourself to, afraid you’ll find that Jason won’t be there anymore. “Hey, Mags,” the figure greets you, and it’s the first time anyone’s called you that in years. It makes sense that it would be Jason who uses the nickname. He gave it to you, after all. ~ You and Jason Todd spent your teen years together under Batman's tutelage and Bruce Wayne's care, your bond going much further than any words can describe. Six years after his apparent death, Jason reappears, both of you angry and dejected, teeming with love you don't know what to do with. You missed each other. ~ Updates the first Monday of each month.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: OMNISCIENT
entry.summary:
Author: jennysketchup

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,811Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 45

Summary: Death and Destiny are star-crossed lovers; they're bound for eternity but are subject to Fate and her imposing presence. You were once an admirer of Fate; the idea of an inescapable future buried a sense of security within you. That was until fate decided it had other plans for you. Gosh... you hate being OMNISCIENT.

entry.summary:

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 43,469Chapters: 11/22Kudos: 120

entry.title: Getting Around Gotham, or: Five Drabble Trysts with Batfam Men, and One 3500 Word Epilogue About How You All Realized It
entry.summary:
Author: gone (relocation)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 100Chapters: 1/6Kudos: 7

Summary: A new arrival alone in Gotham, you make a point of meeting new people and new potential hookups. Little did you know that all your potential dates knew each other. You find yourself entangled with five different men, unaware that they are all connected, as are they, until you all end up at one party. (In your defence, they all had different surnames.) - Inspired by every time I've thought "What if someone dated everyone in the Batfam, and never realized it because they all have different surnames?"- Written for the characters in general, most recently influenced by WFA- Only Jason got outright smut, sorry Dick et al.- Drabbles can pretty much be enjoyed separately, but they are meant to be read together with the longer epilogue. - Titled edited. Originally 3300 word epilogue but decide to go for a 3500 for a nice clean 4k total.
